name: Bruschetta in a Classic Method
recipeIngredient: 2 large slices of good quality bread
About 1/2 cup very thinly sliced mushrooms -- or Roasted eggplant
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Right after toasting the bread, rub it with the cut garlic.
2. Cover the toasted bread slices with the thinly sliced mushrooms (or roasted eggplant) or chopped fresh tomatoes.
3. Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil, season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
4. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Yield: 2 servings
